name: TurnOnGreen, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview TurnOnGreen, Inc., a Nevada corporation (TOGI), through its wholly owned subsidiaries Digital Power Corporation (Digital Power) and TOG Technologies Inc. (TOGT, and together with Digital Power, the TurnOnGreen), is an emerging provider of premium power electronic and electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions.
